category_sources: source_facts.description says kubelogin is an OpenID Connect authentication plugin for kubectl; official GitHub README states it is a kubectl plugin for Kubernetes OIDC authentication.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is kubelogin; official GitHub README uses kubelogin as the project heading.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and links setup, usage, standalone mode, and troubleshooting docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/int128/kubelogin, so repository was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions OpenID Connect authentication plugin for kubectl; official GitHub topics include kubernetes, openid-connect, kubectl, oidc, and kubectl-plugins.
